title: Chankar Kim
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Chankar Kim |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' establishes that Chankar Kim died on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. |species= |gender= |pronouns=She/her''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices=[[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]] }} {{Quote|I'll let you come along on the next mission. Let's polish off a few more of those rough edges first. You can come next time, I promise.|Chankar Kim, to Enwandung-Esterhazy, before the Battle of Geonosis|}} '''Chankar Kim''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who lived during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Sometime around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Kim took [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]] as her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], even though the girl was weak in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. When fellow [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] was captured during a mission on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], Kim was part of a [[Jedi assault team/Legends|Jedi strike team]] sent to rescue him. In the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|ensuing battle]], Kim was [[Death/Legends|killed]], leaving Enwandung-Esterhazy without a master. ==Biography== {{Quote|I don't know what Chankar saw in her.''"
"''We'll never know now.|Mace Windu and Jai Maruk, on Kim and Enwandung-Esterhazy|}} [[File:Tallisibeth_Enwandung-Esterhazy.jpg|thumb|right|Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy, Chankar Kim's Padawan]] Chankar Kim was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Three [[Standard month/Legends|months]] before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|outbreak]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], she took [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]], nicknamed "Scout," as her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], although even [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] member [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] failed to see what potential Kim saw in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]-weak girl. Three months after Kim took Scout as her Padawan, Jedi Knight [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] was captured by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during a mission on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. Windu assembled a [[Jedi assault team/Legends|group of Jedi]] to free them,{{Film|II}} and Kim was part of the task force. Before leaving, she told Scout that her Padawan would accompany her on the next mission. However, the rescue mission turned into a full-scale battle against the Confederate [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid army]], and Kim [[Death/Legends|fell]] in the fight in the [[Petranaki arena]],{{CSWECite|II|217|Kim, Chankar}} leaving Scout an orphaned Padawan with a case of survivor's guilt. [[19 BBY/Legends|Three years later]], shortly before participating in a [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Scout recalled the circumstances in which she had learned Kim would be her master and the circumstances of Kim's death. After Scout won the tournament, she received another Master, [[Jai Maruk]]. However, on their [[Mission to Vjun (Clone Wars)|first mission together]], Maruk was killed too, leaving Scout once again without a Master. ==Personality and traits== Chankar Kim took Scout as her Padawan, despite many Jedi failing to see potential in the seemingly ungifted girl. ==Powers and abilities== As a member of the Jedi Order, Kim was Force-sensitive and trained to [[Force power/Legends|wield]] the Force. She was capable enough to fight in the Battle of Geonosis, although despite being a Jedi Master, she became one of many Jedi killed in the fighting. ==Behind the scenes== Chankar Kim was first mentioned in ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', a novel written by [[Sean Stewart]] and published in [[2004]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Chankar Kim |es=Chankar Kim |pl=Chankar Kim }} {{DEFAULTSORT: Kim, Chankar}} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Jedi assault team members]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Masters]]
